title: PAMSPEC Evaluation Snapshot 0.1-draft
$comment: A sealed Snapshot descriptor used by the PAMSPEC-Evaluation sub-profile. Sealed snapshots are immutable, cryptographically identified (when digest is present), and pin authoritative state and Derived Index identity for deterministic replay of agent evaluation runs.

sealed.$comment: Evaluation snapshots MUST be sealed. Unsealed snapshots use a different descriptor.

ledger_sequence_high_watermark.$comment: Highest Event Ledger sequence included in this snapshot. Events with higher sequence are not visible through the snapshot.

included_object_ids.$comment: Optional explicit set of objects captured. Absent means every object in scope at the high watermark.

deterministic_clock.$comment: Optional deterministic clock injection for evaluation replay. When present, evaluation-time operations should use this clock rather than wall time.

deterministic_rng_seed.$comment: Optional RNG seed for deterministic evaluation.

evaluation_run_id.$comment: Optional identifier for the evaluation run this snapshot is sealed for. Propagated into provenance of evaluation-time operations.
